## Checklist

- [ ] This PR links to an issue using `Closes #<id>`, `Fixes #<id>`, or `Resolves #<id>`
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits: `type(scope): description`
- [ ] I ran relevant local checks (build/tests)
- [ ] I updated docs/config where needed
- [ ] I confirmed no secrets were committed
- [ ] I considered architecture boundaries (Domain -> Application -> Infrastructure -> Presentation)
- [ ] If schema changed, I added and applied EF Core migrations
